title: What would have Asuka been like if she has been given love and care
display_title: What would have Asuka been like if she has been given love and care
wikitext:
[]: What would have Asuka been like if she has been given love and care?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Mon May 22, 2023 8:28 pm It’s one of those what if scenarios that I’ve been thinking lately. Basically, her troubles and her whole being stems from the extreme lack of care and affection she so craves. So this raises the question; what would she have been like if she was given the proper care and love as everyone else? Would she have been more different? More mentally stable maybe?

[]: Re: What would have Asuka been like if she has been given love and care?             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Tue May 23, 2023 6:31 am C.T.1290 wrote: It’s one of those what if scenarios that I’ve been thinking lately. Basically, her troubles and her whole being stems from the extreme lack of care and affection she so craves. So this raises the question; what would she have been like if she was given the proper care and love as everyone else? Would she have been more different? More mentally stable maybe?

[]: Re: What would have Asuka been like if she has been given love and care?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue May 23, 2023 5:55 pm basic personality traits are fairly inborn so she would probably still be loud, confident, ambitious etc. just not to an exaggerated degree & with better coping mechanisms.

[]: Re: What would have Asuka been like if she has been given love and care?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Tue May 23, 2023 6:25 pm I think that Asuka could use more love and sympathy. I know all the posts I made about her before weren’t so positive, I decided to try something a little more of an opposite of what I did before. The girl doesn’t get much love and attention. If she given proper parental care, she probably would have been a better person. SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: What would have Asuka been like if she has been given love and care?             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Wed May 24, 2023 9:48 pm I get plenty of love and care and I'm still a brat.

[]: Re: What would have Asuka been like if she has been given love and care?             Quote Post by Sefirot Tree Of Life » Wed Jun 07, 2023 5:07 pm Asuka needs more then love and care, she needs a better childhood, better friends, and a better life. So many of her problems come from her childhood trauma and using piloting as her coping mechanism. What would Asuka be like? Difficult to say since so much of her personality is created from her trauma and identity as a Pilot. Without it? Obviously more mentally stable. Not nearly as competitive, argumentative, and conflict causing. Better with people. Wouldn't react so negatively to...everything. A couple of times in the series we see Asuka as much more relaxed and happy. She'd probably be like that. Very proud, but not vain. She'd be more full of herself in an endearing way. She'd probably still be spoiled and materialistic but she'd be much more affectionate and happy, and have more friends to. Gets along with everyone better to. Even with Rei!

[]: Re: What would have Asuka been like if she has been given love and care?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Thu Jun 08, 2023 6:52 pm Sefirot Tree Of Life wrote: Asuka needs more then love and care, she needs a better childhood, better friends, and a better life. So many of her problems come from her childhood trauma and using piloting as her coping mechanism.
